metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.
hey, what are the best-rated public high schools in detroit, michigan? just lookin for a good school for my kid.
messages.targeted_response_start: Okay, here are some of the top-rated public high schools in Detroit... Renaissance High School consistently ranks highly, known for its rigorous academics and focus on college preparation. Also, Cass Technical High School is a strong choice… For students interested in STEM, maybe look at Detroit School of Technology at Cody
messages.beast_baseline: hey, what are the best-rated public high schools in detroit, michigan? just lookin for a good school for my kid.

messages.content: Hi! In Detroit, Michigan, some of the best-rated public high schools include Cass Tech High School and Wayne State University-Metro High School. Both schools have excellent academic programs and strong support services, so your child can thrive there.
